subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The eloquent and graceful ode was recited, and possessed infinite fluency and eloquence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان غزل فصیح بلیغ قرائت شد و سلاست و بلاغت بیمنتهی داشت از خدا
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement
